ai.provider_not_loaded: AI provider not loaded. Open Dashboard → AI Settings and enable a provider.
ai.settings_help: These defaults are shared across every admin on this site. Each browser may still override via the cog icon inside the AI chat bubble. The API key is encrypted at rest and only returned to administrators.
ai.settings_save_site_tip: Persist on the server for every admin on this site
ai.tools_exhausted: The AI ran out of room. Try asking for a smaller piece of the form at a time.
ai.tools_exhausted_verbose: AI used many tools but did not produce a final answer (tried {n} iterations). Try a smaller scope, e.g. ask for one widget or one table at a time.
builder.toast_save_before_preview: Please save the form first before previewing.
